# AGENTS

<!-- Trimmed fixture copy: the evaluator's required_files check only asserts
     this file exists at the candidate root, not its contents. -->

This repository has no product roadmap. It does have mandatory project law.

Before changing anything, read `RULES.md`. Its GitHub-policy, beneficial-use,
disclosure, security, and enforcement requirements apply to every agent,
model, bot, integration, operator, credential, and account.
